name: Rotel Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger meat and sausage together; set aside.
2. Saute the onions; set aside.
3. Melt the jalapeno cheese and Velveeta cheese.
4. Add the Ro-Tel tomatoes and cream of chicken soup to the melted cheese mixture.
5. Add the browned hamburger meat, sausage, and sauteed onion to the cheese sauce.
6. Heat until bubbly.
7. Serve with chips.
